CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(PHA__Imputed_Income_Type__c, 'Override'), IF(PHA__Imputed_Income_Override__c > PHA__Income_from_Assets__c, PHA__Imputed_Income_Override__c, PHA__Income_from_Assets__c),IF(PHA__Imputed_Income__c > PHA__Income_from_Assets__c, PHA__Imputed_Income__c, PHA__Income_from_Assets__c))
CustomField.label: Total Income from Assets
